demographics.living_situation: shares a house with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Roommate calling] He fell and hit the back of his head really hard, was knocked out cold for a couple of minutes, and now he keeps throwing up and asking the same questions over and over. He's really out of it and I think one of his eyes looks bigger than the other. What do I do?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He fell off a low wall about half an hour ago, landed on his head on concrete, and he's getting worse — more confused and vomiting again.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago, right after he fell backward off a low retaining wall (about 1.5 m) onto concrete and hit the back of his head
symptom_narrative.duration: getting worse over the last 15 minutes
symptom_narrative.character: he was knocked out for about 2 minutes, then woke up dazed; now a bad headache at the back of the head, throwing up over and over, and very drowsy and confused
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the roommate says he seems really bad and is going downhill fast
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: back of the head where he hit it; there's a big soft lump there
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting worse since the fall
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up makes the dizziness and vomiting worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: keeps asking what happened, doesn't remember the fall, very sleepy and hard to keep talking
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before, he was completely well earlier today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sit up without severe dizziness and vomiting; lying on the couch, barely responding

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: the roommate is not aware of him taking any regular medicines

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the roommate mentions they had been out earlier; unsure whether he had been drinking alcohol

objective_data_offered.value: one pupil (the right) looks bigger than the other to the roommate on the video
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay observation over a phone camera in poor lighting — not a formal pupil examination

objective_data_offered.value: he was knocked out cold for about two minutes after the fall and keeps asking the same questions, doesn't remember what happened
he has vomited three times in the last 15 minutes and is retching into a bucket
he is very drowsy, pale and hard to keep awake, only mumbling short answers
a large soft swelling on the back of the head where he landed
low concrete retaining wall in the yard, about 1.5 m high, confirmed as where he fell
